description: Live run-tool E2E tool list for the Beehave Tools extension. Driven by tests/e2e/run_tool_e2e.py from the e2e-godot CI leg against a connected headless editor + a local gamedev-mcp-server. Each entry is one real assertion: a regression in the tool turns the CI leg red. `init` substitutes beehave here; replace these sample entries with your real tools as you add them.
notes: The two scaffold tools need no scene: beehave-echo is pure-managed and beehave-editor-info only reads editor info. When you add an editor tool that operates on nodes (it resolves them relative to EditorInterface.GetEditedSceneRoot(), which is null on a freshly-booted headless editor), add a 'setup' entry that opens a scene first, e.g.: {"tool":"scene-create","input":{"resourcePath":"res://e2e.tscn","rootTypeClassName":"Node3D","rootName":"Root"},"expect":["\"isActive\":true"]}. 'expect' substrings are matched against godot-cli's compact --raw JSON.
